title: rhacoma coriacea
intro: Rhacoma coriacea, also known as Indian sarsaparilla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asclepiadaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Rhacoma coriacea has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antiseptic. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
